creator: ccowart@rescomp.berkeley.edu
text:
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
The patch updates the port for a new upstream release. It applies
cleanly, works for me, and passes portlint.

I approve of applying this patch to security/pam_require.

-- 
Christopher Cowart
Unix Systems Administrator
Residential Computing, UC Berkeley
"May all your pushes be popped"
